channel_intelligence.state_of_channel: Day 21. 9 videos live, 118 lifetime views (+49 WoW), 7 subscribers (+3). Weekly views rose 32->49 (+53%) - the first real acceleration since launch. The engine is confirmed: the July 6 long 'Focus Music... Deep Work & Studying' pulled 30 views in its FIRST week - the best week-1 long yet, beating the Study long's 20. Longs now average 32 lifetime views vs 3.5 for shorts (9x). Today the first Fun Bossa long goes live - the first clean cross-style A/B. Deep metrics (CTR, watch time, traffic) still locked until the ADM Google account is added to Chrome.
what_works: SEARCH-INTENT TITLES win, now proven across 3 longs: Focus/Deep-Work long = 30 wk1, Study long = 60 lifetime, but the mood-only 'Rainy' long = just 7. A 5-8x gap purely from title keywords.
LONG-FORM >> SHORTS: 3 longs = 97 lifetime views (32/video), 6 shorts = 21 (3.5/video). 9x gap, reconfirmed every week.
COMPOUNDING: the Jun 22 Study long is still climbing in week 4 (60 lifetime, +4 this week). Longs age like assets.
SUBS TRACK LONGS: +3 subs the same week the Focus long got picked up by search - long-form search viewers convert.
next_moves: Audit every scheduled long's title for a search keyword (study/focus/work/relax/sleep/morning). Flag 'Cheerful Bossa Nova Brunch Vibes' (Jul 27) - mood-only, add 'for Work & Focus' before it publishes.
Watch the Fun Bossa long (b6jVoiD_qaQ, live today) week-1 views vs Focus (30) and Study (20). First style A/B - this decides how hard to push Fun Bossa.
Swap one weekly short for a 2nd long. Shorts underperform 9x and the render queue is stocked - capacity exists.
Protect the Monday long: best thumbnail, best title, best mix go there.
Add the ADM Google account to Chrome to unlock CTR, impressions, watch time and traffic sources.
suno_prompts: Warm bossa nova instrumental for deep focus, nylon-string guitar, soft brushed drums, mellow Rhodes, upright bass, no vocals, steady unintrusive tempo, cozy study-cafe ambience for deep work
Calm Brazilian jazz trio for studying, acoustic guitar, upright bass, light shaker, gentle piano, no vocals, consistent low energy, background focus music for reading and long work sessions
Relaxing bossa nova lounge for a slow morning, bright nylon guitar, soft flute, brushed snare, no vocals, medium-mellow tempo, instrumental, warm cafe mix for morning coffee and easy focus
channel_intelligence.suno_rules: Data-backed prompt rules: (1) always 'instrumental / no vocals' - background music; (2) keep energy CONSISTENT, no dynamic spikes - focus listeners leave when a track jumps; (3) bake the LISTENING CONTEXT into the prompt (deep work, studying, morning coffee) - it shapes arrangement toward what the search audience wants, and titles built on those same words (study/focus/deep work) are the single biggest view driver; (4) name 2-3 concrete instruments, not just a genre; (5) longs are the asset - engineer prompts for 1hr+ evergreen mixes, not short loops.

social_intelligence.state_of_socials: Followers still seed-stage: Instagram 3, TikTok 3, YouTube 7 (live channel count; Zernio reports 4, it lags). 13 posts went out in the trailing 7 days (YouTube 5, TikTok 4, Instagram 5) - up from 6 last week. Posting stalled Jul 9-11 but resumed Jul 12 on the new 2x/day cadence (12pm + 6pm ET). The clip queue is healthy: ~53 reels stocked and the nightly factory is running (fresh clips timestamped Jul 12-13). The single most important thing: supply and cadence are now both healthy - the bottleneck has shifted to whether any platform's views start separating, which needs more posts live before it shows.
whats_out: 13 reels live in last 7d across IG (5), TikTok (4), YouTube Shorts (5) - all point to the YouTube channel (link-in-bio funnel)
New cadence confirmed working: 2 posts/day at 12pm + 6pm ET, 7 days/week via Zernio
Clip queue stocked (~53), nightly reel factory producing - no supply risk near-term
Zernio accounts all active (IG/TikTok/YouTube); TikTok is the paid slot
suggestions: Keep the 2x/day cadence running now that Jul 9-11 gap is fixed - consistency is the whole game at this follower size.
Carry the proven title rule into captions: lead with 'study', 'focus', 'deep work', 'morning coffee' - the same search intent that drives longs works in social discovery.
Once ~10+ posts are live per platform, score TikTok vs IG vs Shorts view retention and double down on the winner (next weekly report).
Every reel caption should name the full 1-hour long it's cut from and push the sub link - the reels exist to feed the channel, not to win on their own.
Fun Bossa clips are now entering the queue - tag clip filenames by style so the weekly report can A/B social performance the way we A/B the longs.
